Administer self-hosted and dedicated Losant Enterprise Instances: instance members, organizations, organization members and invites, custom workflow nodes, sandboxes, notification rules, and audit logs. Derived from the Losant Platform API (Bravado/Swagger 2) at https://api.losant.com/.
